ec2.launchtemplate.memorymib.CfnAbout: The minimum and maximum amount of memory, in MiB.

ec2.launchtemplate.memorymib.Max.Description: The maximum amount of memory, in MiB. To specify no maximum limit, omit this parameter.

ec2.launchtemplate.memorymib.Min.Description: The minimum amount of memory, in MiB. To specify no minimum limit, specify `0`.
